subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! Praise be to God in this Day which is illumined by the splendors of His countenance and which hath been designated in the divine Books as the Day of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد الحمد لله در یومیکه از انوار وجه منور است و در کتب الهی بیوم الله
subcodes.subjects: @Primal Will and the Word; Remembrance; Manifestation of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
